rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Leave To Amend First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION TO AMEND. DEFENDANT AGREES THAT CLAIMS REGARDING ONLINE SERVICES CAN BE RAISED UNDER EXISTING PLEADING NO NEED FOR AMENDMENT. IN ADDITION WITH MARCH 18, 2002 TRIAL DATE PLAINTIFF HAS UNREASONABLY DELAYED IN PRESENTING AMENDMENT. (CW)
